name: benedictdixon.github.io
description: Benedict W. H. Dixon · An Almanack — personal site.

scripts.build:og: node tools/generate-og.cjs && rsvg-convert -w 1200 -h 630 assets/og-image.svg -o assets/og-image.png && pngquant --quality=75-95 --strip --force --output assets/og-image.png assets/og-image.png && rm assets/og-image.svg
